meta.title: CineForum - Choose movies with friends
meta.description: Create a round, invite friends to propose movies, vote together. The best one wins. No arguments, just cinema.

proposal.title: {{cineforumName}} — CineForum
proposal.description: Propose movies, vote and choose together what to watch in the "{{cineforumName}}" cineforum.

movies.title: Movies — {{cineforumName}} · CineForum
movies.description: All movies watched in the "{{cineforumName}}" cineforum with stats and ratings.

oscars.title: Oscars — {{cineforumName}} · CineForum
oscars.description: The Oscar awards of the "{{cineforumName}}" cineforum: the best movies voted by the group.

timeline.title: Timeline — {{cineforumName}} · CineForum
timeline.description: All movies in the "{{cineforumName}}" cineforum sorted by release year.

stats.title: Stats — {{cineforumName}} · CineForum
stats.description: Member statistics for the "{{cineforumName}}" cineforum: ratings, preferences and profiles.
